theme_archetype.rationale: The user explicitly requested a pure black background (#000000) with a bold, premium, slightly rebellious 'expensive' agency feel. Combining Swiss typography (Inter 900) with Luxury dark mode elements matches the Overdose/Linear/Active Theory inspiration.

scale.labels: text-xs md:text-sm uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-medium text-[#A0A0A0]

sections_blueprint.name: Header
sections_blueprint.details: Fixed header. Starts completely transparent. On scroll, transitions to glassmorphism: `backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)]`.

sections_blueprint.name: Hero
sections_blueprint.details: Massive headline: 'We Don't Follow Trends. We Create Them.' Center or Left-aligned with text-reveal (character-by-character). Abstract dark purple 3D shapes floating in the background via parallax. Magnetic primary CTA button.

sections_blueprint.name: Services
sections_blueprint.details: Grid of 8 large cards (Growth Marketing, Performance Marketing, SEO, AI SEO, LinkedIn Marketing, Brand Strategy, Content Production, Marketing Automation). Hover effect: subtle indigo glow `hover:border-[#4F46E5] transition-colors duration-500`.

sections_blueprint.name: Case Studies
sections_blueprint.details: Full-screen horizontal scroll using GSAP ScrollTrigger (or Framer Motion useScroll). Large image cards showcasing premium digital dashboards/work.

sections_blueprint.name: Why Adcom
sections_blueprint.details: Animated counters triggered on scroll: 10+ Brands, 4+ Years, Millions Revenue, Thousands Leads. Minimalist typography.

sections_blueprint.name: Process
sections_blueprint.details: 4-step vertical or alternating timeline: 01 Discovery, 02 Strategy, 03 Creation, 04 Growth. Sticky scroll or connecting animated lines.

sections_blueprint.name: Testimonials
sections_blueprint.details: Premium carousel (use Embla or Swiper, or framer-motion drag). Large typography for quotes. Client details with modern office dark lighting backgrounds or clean avatars.

sections_blueprint.name: Contact
sections_blueprint.details: Massive CTA 'Let's Build Something That Grows.' Minimalist high-converting form customized to pure dark mode.

sections_blueprint.name: Footer
sections_blueprint.details: Massive 'ADCOM' branding (text-[10vw]). Grid layout for links. Darker contrast.

motion_choreography.hero_reveal: Staggered character-by-character reveal for the hero headline. (y: 100%, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_choreography.scroll_linked: Horizontal scroll for Case Studies. Parallax on hero abstract shapes.
motion_choreography.hover_effects: Magnetic buttons (using framer-motion or GSAP tracking mouse). Subtle border glow on cards (`hover:border-[#6366F1] transition-colors duration-300`).
motion_choreography.image_masking: Images reveal with a clip-path sliding effect (`clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0)` to `inset(0 0 0 0)`).

hero_backgrounds.description: Abstract purple wave background, use with low opacity/blend mode

case_studies.description: Dark architecture for case study placeholder 1
Minimalist typography work for case study placeholder 2

office_lifestyle.description: Man looking out window - use for testimonial background or contact section

instructions_to_main_agent: STRICT: Adhere entirely to the provided colors. Background MUST be pure #000000. Do NOT use slate/gray backgrounds.
STRICT: Use Inter font everywhere. Weight 900 for headings, 400-500 for body.
STRICT: Ensure heading sizes hit the exact scale: Hero 80-120px, Sections 48-64px.
STRICT: You are using .js and .jsx files. Do NOT use .tsx format.
STRICT: ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid="contact-submit-button").
Implement the 'Magnetic Button' effect using Framer Motion.
Implement the Horizontal Scroll section using framer-motion useScroll or GSAP ScrollTrigger for the Case Studies.
For components, build custom HTML/Tailwind structures to achieve the premium 'Awwwards' overlapping layout. Limit Shadcn to forms or complex interactive bits.
Testimonials must be an auto-scrolling marquee or premium carousel.
